name: Rubber Stamp Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Nutmeg OR 1 tsp Vanilla Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, then the milk (or cream).
3. Add vanilla extract if using.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the salt with nutmeg (if using) or vanilla extract into the flour.
5. Combine the flour mixture with the butter mixture.
6. Knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic.
7. Shape the dough into cookies and chill for 20 minutes.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until set.
The Polka Dot Palace BBS 1-201-822-3627.
